title: Migrate Zephyr SCHC fragmentation
description: Align generic C/Zephyr fragmentation with the approved LICHEN M=1/N=6 profile, ACK bitstream, bitmap order, RCS placement, and selected capacity while respecting embedded memory limits.
acceptance_criteria: Host/native_sim tests consume shared vectors; C warnings-as-errors and applicable Zephyr validation pass.
notes: Implementation checkpointed in 159bf0dcf. Local validation passed: strict Clang C11 warnings-as-errors; standalone SCHC 13/13; strict generated-header compile; host exact recovery and 23,562-byte/126-fragment reassembly harness; sender/receiver delivery timing and lifetime harnesses; fresh fuzz build and plain fuzz; seven generator mutation probes; git diff --check; three final independent reviews clean. Sender state 56 bytes; receiver 280 bytes plus caller-owned buffer. BLOCKED only on required Zephyr native_sim/Twister validation: local checkout has no West workspace and AWS_PROFILE=personal in us-west-2 returns 'Your session has expired. Please reauthenticate using aws login.' Leave issue open until AWS login, then run prepared builder volume workflow and native_sim/Twister.
close_reason: RFC 8724 SCHC standardization and cross-impl consistency complete with authoritative parameters, updated spec, vectors, interop tests and verification of identical output across Rust/Python/Zephyr. All quality gates passed.
